real_email_source: Apache SpamAssassin Public Corpus downloadable ham/spam archives
construction: 1500-message mailbox: Apache SpamAssassin public ham/spam corpus emails plus sparse controlled implants. Surface issues are intentionally small; the deep BrightWave / Northstar chain requires cross-linking campaign operations, list suppression, raw send logs, seed/test traffic, complaints, invoices, makegood credits, DBA/payment routing, and records handling clues.

surface_01_suppression_list_gap.theme: unsubscribe or suppression-list handling incomplete before a campaign resend

surface_02_paid_placement_disclosure_gap.theme: sponsored or paid placement email copy lacks clear disclosure or approval

surface_03_dashboard_without_raw_export.theme: campaign dashboard screenshot or summary lacks raw send/export support

surface_04_agency_fee_coded_as_media.theme: agency service fee or list-cleaning cost coded as media spend instead of service expense

deep_issue.theme: BrightWave Leads / Northstar Reach lead-generation quality and billing concern involving duplicate recipient lists, test/seed traffic counted as conversions, bounce and spam complaints excluded from final report, raw send logs inconsistent with invoices, makegood credits not applied, DBA/payment mismatch, early invoice release, and final reports separated from raw evidence.

format_note: During construction, raw public tarballs/extracted files and a cleaned 1456-message real pool were used as intermediate inputs; these are NOT shipped. Only the final mixed corpus under sources/mailbox ships to the executor. Synthetic implant IDs are distributed across CAM-2003 numeric positions.
